• Procedural mining world with dynamic day/night cycle and visor‑range fog of war.
  • Multiplayer sync (host‑election, map/tiles, chat, trading, explosions) plus single‑player mode.
  • Modular UI: HUD gauges, minimap, inventory, shop, warp, admin panel and custom‑texture system.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy(item)

This page implements a full‑featured “Mega Miner NG” game using HTML5 canvas, custom shaders, and a lightweight networking layer. It provides procedural terrain generation, mining mechanics with upgrades, multiplayer state handling, and an extensive UI system for inventory, shop, chat, and admin controls. The code is organized into self‑contained classes (GameEngine, SoundManager, ShopSystem, ModalSystem) and uses CSS variables for theming and responsive mobile controls.
